title: Sherbert Lemon UK signs on as Cryptool design partner
content_html:
Sherbert Lemon UK, a full-service creative design agency, has joined Cryptool as a brand and visual design partner.

The studio takes on branding, graphic design and customised visual work for the platform, with a remit that ranges from day-to-day creative through to bigger campaigns ahead of the platform launch.

This is the design half of the partnership stack the team has been quietly putting in place: Kyano Digital on engineering, Sherbert Lemon on design. Together they cover everything Cryptool needs to ship a platform that looks and feels as serious as the technology behind it.
author: Cryptool
